name: Brigid
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Brigid is a bedrock of becoming — Hearth; under Sun; in Leo.
flowText: Brigid is a bedrock of becoming — Hearth; under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Hestia
related.teaser: Hestia embodies hearth, home, sacred flame — under Vesta/Moon; in Cancer, Virgo.

related.name: Hephaestus
related.teaser: Hephaestus embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: Vulcan
related.teaser: Vulcan embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: Vesta
related.teaser: Vesta embodies hearth, home, sacred flame — under Vesta/Moon; in Cancer, Virgo.

related.name: Inanna/Ishtar
related.teaser: Inanna/Ishtar embodies love and war paradox — under Venus · Mars; in Aries, Libra.

related.name: ♌ Leo
related.teaser: Leo is the lion’s flame — crown of fire, creative will, sovereign radiance.

related.name: Centeotl
related.teaser: Centeotl golden maize-lord — sweetness lifted from soil to song.
